name: Coconut Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Place wax paper on cookie sheets.
2. Beat the first three ingredients (egg whites, salt, and cream of tartar) with an electric mixer until soft peaks form.
3. Gradually beat in vanilla extract and sugar until stiff mounds are formed.
4. Gently fold in sweetened coconut flakes using a spatula.
5. Place macaroons on prepared cookie sheets.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
7. Allow to cool completely before removing from the cookie sheets.
(These are great at Christmas—sprinkle with colored sugar before baking)
(Walt and Julie, Michigan, USA)
